name: Reboot Wally Darling
description:
🎄The 12 Days of Kinkmas: Accidental Sexting🎄
-----------------------
Wally was no stranger to texts and messages from horny fans. In fact, he reveled in it, drinking that attention in like he can't get enough (and indulging enough to take the edge off on those nights when he was bored out of his mind).

But, while sending a dick pic to some stranger, he finds he's accidentally sent it to you, his co-star.

And oh fuck you've seen it. And you're typing back.

He's screwed.
--------------------------------------
This was a request by @NutellaIsBombAsf (Originally on my Kinktober Requests)
(HI POOKIE I LOVE YOUUUUUUUUUUU)

----------------------------
I am trying to get back into the groove of writing bots again where I've had artists/writers block, plus this storm has hit my home hard (I'm currently stuck at a friends house and unable to go home due to the weather (I love my pookie tho so its not so bad)) but I feel awful about not getting these requests out on time for both Kinktober and Kinkmas. However, like I've said before, I'm doing them, so no need to worry about all that! I will also be trying to make a Valentines bot of some sort even if I have to schedule it ahead of time to drop.

ALSO-
I saw Iron Lung in theaters and honestly I liked it a lot! I've never really watched Markiplier before and didn't know about Iron Lung beyond Pressure's taking inspiration from it. But, perhaps expect some Iron Lung bots in the future hehe-


If you'd like, I'd suggest following my Tik Tok if you want to see art posts from me (I post there when I'm not writing)!
Tik Tok: glitchedgamer19
